founder_gate: P0 copy ship — ACCEPT rows only on public www
positioning_source: We help companies clean messy AI/agent systems by finding unclear language, conflicting decisions, fake authority, unsafe automation wording, and public-risk claims, then turning the cleanup into machine-enforced rules.

claims.claim: Find unclear policy and automation language before production
claims.buyer_wording: Surface unclear language, conflicting approvals, and unsafe automation wording before Copilot touches production data
claims.scope: Trust Brief diagnostic + sandbox sample — not certifier

claims.claim: Resolve conflicting decisions with named approvers and go/no-go records
claims.buyer_wording: Every go/no-go produces a signed Trust Ledger Entry with confidence score and evidence index
claims.scope: Sandbox + Governance Pack — sample TLE on www

claims.claim: Remove fake authority and overstated certification on public surfaces
claims.buyer_wording: Honest scope badges — orientation only, not legal advice or certification
claims.scope: Public www hygiene — internal ops separate

claims.claim: Block unsafe automation promises on buyer-facing copy
claims.buyer_wording: Invalid changes blocked · allowed decisions receipted · export fails closed on tamper
claims.scope: Product behavior + copy gates — not full agent platform

claims.claim: Scrub public-risk claims that cannot be verified
claims.buyer_wording: Public claims tied to sample receipts, export verify, and procurement artifacts — no fake logos or ARR
claims.scope: www + intake — claim-evidence matrix required for new claims

claims.buyer_wording: Machine-enforced rules your auditors can test — evaluate API, TLE export, fail-closed verify
claims.scope: Sandbox sample + production Governance Pack — rules enforced in product path

claims.claim: We clean every company's messy AI stack end-to-end
claims.scope: Overbroad — use three contract SKUs and honest scope only

claims.claim: Generic agent-system cleanup for any vendor
claims.buyer_wording: Copilot governance primary · agentic workflows via governance specialist lane
claims.scope: Lead with M365 Copilot; expand copy after founder verdict
